[[File:Fanback_eggpic.jpg|thumb|left|A fanback egg]]

The '''fanback''' was a cold-blooded amphibian from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Each fanback had a big dorsal spine along with a sensitive snout.<ref name="game" />

Fanbacks were carnivores<ref name="game" /> and had no problems eating the egg-eaters themselves.

Soon after [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] transported fanbacks and other animals to the moon of [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] to try and establish an ecosystem. Most of the flora and fauna of Ohma-D'un, however, was destroyed by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] during the [[Battle of Ohma-D'un]].

==Behind the scenes==
The fanback resembles an extinct Earth species known as a ''[[Wikipedia:dimetrodon|Dimetrodon]]''.
